api_url.description: Advanced override for the FlexiPort integrations API base URL. When set, it wins over any base URL inlined in access_key via the '<key>@<url>' form. Defaults to production (e.g. http://localhost:3010/integrations/v1).

image_rehost_product_page.description: Cursor for the non-workflow image rehosting pass over imported products.

image_rehost_category_page.description: Cursor for the non-workflow image rehosting pass over imported categories.

image_rehost_processed_count.description: Number of source images uploaded to Swell CDN for this import.

image_rehost_error_count.description: Number of image URLs the rehosting pass could not fetch or upload.

date_images_completed.description: Set when all completed product/category files for this import have been scanned for external images.

page_size.description: FlexiPort page size used for this file's current run. Stored so a deployed tuning change cannot alter resume offsets mid-file.

claim_token.description: Opaque token for the workflow attempt that currently owns this file.

claim_started_at.description: When the current processing claim was acquired.

workflow_id.description: Durable import workflow instance id processing this file.

workflow_started_at.description: When the workflow instance was created for the current claim.

ignored_records_count.description: Total ignored records for this file. Written from per-page counts; details live in ignored-records.

ignored_records.description: Legacy bounded sample only. Full ignored-record details are stored in ignored-records.

page.description: Source page that produced this ignored record; lets a retried page replace its own entries idempotently.

ignored_pages.description: Deprecated staging field retained for compatibility; do not store bulk ignored rows here.

ignored_page_counts.description: Per-page ignored counts keyed by page number. Bounded by page count and written idempotently via dotted $set.
